name: SOAR AR Smoke Test 3.0.5
description: Live-fire validation of all six Active Response actions against the 192.168.1.222 dev manager. Linux target: agent 005 (Agent-70). Windows kill/disable target: agent 007 (RootSeeker). Windows isolate target: agent 056 (AnshWindowsVirtualMachine). Manual dispatch only — not webhook-triggered. Before running, operator must pre-create user 'soartest' on agents 005 and 007, and pre-run 'sleep 999 &' on agent 005 + 'powershell -c Start-Sleep -Seconds 999' on agent 007 to provide benign processes for the kill_process steps.

steps.name: Linux kill_process on agent 005 (Agent-70)
steps.description: Kill 'sleep' processes on Linux agent. Pre-req: sleep 999 & running on 005.

steps.name: Linux disable_user LOCK on agent 005
steps.description: Lock 'soartest' account on Linux agent. Pre-req: useradd -m soartest on 005.

steps.name: Linux disable_user UNLOCK on agent 005
steps.description: Reverse step 02 — unlock 'soartest' account via Wazuh AR delete path.

steps.name: Windows kill_process on agent 007 (RootSeeker)
steps.description: Kill 'powershell' processes running Start-Sleep on Windows agent. Pre-req: a sleeping powershell process on 007.

steps.name: Windows disable_user LOCK on agent 007
steps.description: Lock 'soartest' account on Windows agent. Pre-req: net user soartest /add on 007.

steps.name: Windows disable_user UNLOCK on agent 007
steps.description: Reverse step 05 — unlock 'soartest' on Windows via AR delete path.

steps.name: Linux isolate_host ADD on agent 005
steps.description: ISOLATE Linux endpoint. WARNING: pre-stage SSH from a non-192.168.1.222 jump host before running. Step 08 MUST run within 60s.

steps.name: Linux isolate_host RELEASE on agent 005
steps.description: Reverse step 07 — un-isolate via AR delete path. Restores network on 005.

steps.name: Windows isolate_host ADD on agent 056 (AnshWindowsVirtualMachine)
steps.description: ISOLATE Windows VM. WARNING: pre-stage hypervisor console access before running. Step 10 MUST run within 60s.

steps.name: Windows isolate_host RELEASE on agent 056
steps.description: Reverse step 09 — restore Windows network on 056.
